question: What are the top origin-destination pairs for the South Region fleet in the last 14 days?
reasoning: SJ Tech Campus → Santa Clara Depot is the South Region's anchor corridor at 88 trips (6.3/day), reflecting the morning dispatch-and-return cycle. The Santa Clara → Sunnyvale micro-run at 5.8 km is highly repetitive; batching two deliveries per run here could reclaim ~40 daily km. SJ Tech → Milpitas is the longest routine lane at 14.2 km; Santos (s2) and Ahmed (s1) account for 78% of these runs. The Campbell → Los Gatos corridor is exclusive to Hassan (s5) and shows the high-idle pattern flagged in the outlier analysis.
